title: Lemery Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Lemery with a Z-Score of +4.71. This extreme weather event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Lemery is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 58%, while the wind speed is moderate at 8.8 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, leading to significant disruptions in various sectors.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
